items.phrase: I'm going to tell you about myself
items.example: I'm going to tell you about myself and my journey.

items.phrase: three words that describe me would be
items.example: Three words that describe me would be creative, patient and optimistic.

items.phrase: One of the things I like about my lifestyle
items.translation: Одна из вещей, которые мне нравятся в моём образе жизни
items.example: One of the things I like about my lifestyle is that I travel a lot.

items.phrase: I suppose that's one thing I don't like
items.translation: Полагаю, это одна вещь, которая мне не нравится
items.example: I suppose that's one thing I don't like about living in a big city.
My idea of perfect happiness is spending time with family.
